story-0034-0001.notes: Story text reconciliations: 15 tests not 14, 18 YAMLs not 17, FileCategorizer workflows fall-through documented. RULE-003 mitigation explicit in TASK-005. BREAKING CHANGE commit in TASK-003.
story-0034-0001.summary: 6 atomic commits. BREAKING CHANGE in 576a30383. 34→27 assemblers. 5 orphan helpers + 2 tests deleted to maintain coverage. PlanTemplates/EpicReport assemblers stopped dual-targeting .github/templates/. Goldens regenerated. 95 .github/workflows/ preserved (RULE-003). PR #274 OPEN awaiting review.

story-0034-0002.notes: CRITICAL: DocsAdrAssembler (shared class) registered in buildCodexAssemblers — must relocate before deleting method (TASK-001 DoD). CODEX_AGENTS preservation: adjacent to CODEX in enum, owned by story 0003 (TASK-003 explicit grep). 17 additional test files reference Platform.CODEX/hasCodex beyond the 6 Codex-specific — may require coalescing TASK-002 and TASK-003 if test-compile breaks between them. Manifest regeneration deferred to TASK-006 or story 0005. Largest single-story golden deletion: 2944 files.

story-0034-0003.notes: Classification resolved baseline delta: 2 of 4 *Agents* main + 5 of 12 *Agents*Test* classes belong to stories 0001/0002. Story 0003 actual scope: 2 main + 6 tests + 1 fixture + 17 .agents/ golden dirs (~2910 files). No targets/agents/ source dir (defensive test -d in TASK-003). Linear sequential tasks 001→002→003→004, zero parallelism. PlatformFilter reserved for story 0004.

story-0034-0004.notes: 7 tasks (linear 001→002→002b→003→004→005→006). RULE-004 gate doubled in tasks 003 + 006. PlanTemplatesAssembler already 354 lines (over Rule-03 250 limit) — fallback extracts helper class. EpicReportAssembler has same GITHUB_OUTPUT_SUBDIR constant (story missed this). Package-path drifts corrected. ReadmeAssembler has no target branches (story describes intent, not current state). Task 006 needs LOC baseline file from story 0003. 12 CWE-tagged DoD items (CWE-22, CWE-209, CWE-710).

story-0034-0005.notes: Closer story: 5 sequential verify/docs tasks. CRITICAL: CLAUDE.md root + .claude/rules/*.md are GENERATED outputs — must edit source under java/src/main/resources/targets/claude/ first, then regenerate (MEMORY.md hint: mvn process-resources before any regen). README.md ~L820 has canonical regen command. BREAKING CHANGE footer in TASK-002 commit. Rule 09 branching: PR targets develop. TASK-004 produces 9-scenario evidence matrix under reports/task-005-004/.
